20.reason: [The semicolon after 'else if(n==-1)' makes the break unconditional, causing the loop to exit immediately after reading -1 without processing it properly. This leads to premature termination and incorrect behavior.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The semicolon after 'else if(n==-1)' makes the break unconditional, causing the loop to exit immediately after reading -1 without processing it properly. This leads to premature termination and incorrect behavior.]
